title: trifolium scutatum
intro: Trifolium scutatum, also known as the scutate clover or small-leafed clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trifolium scutatum include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Trifolium scutatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties.
